info.name: Simsir - 01 User Role Token Setup
info.description: Single Postman collection with folders to register role test users, login, assign roles, relogin, and verify access summary. Uses environment variables for Backend_URL and role tokens.

item.description: Creates customer, order manager, and support staff test users. 409 Conflict is accepted for repeatable setup.

item.description: Relogs users after role assignment and saves final access tokens.

item.name: 05 Verify Access Summary
item.description: Calls GET /api/auth/me/access with each token and verifies expected role/isAdmin behavior.
